rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Set-Aside Award To Pltf For Attorney Fee On Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 25, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT ANNE KIHAGI Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Set-Aside Award To Pltf For Attorney Fee On Appeal is continued to be heard by the Honorable Angela Bradstreet in Department 624. The parties will be notified of the date and time of the hearing after October 10, 2019. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN MANN ET AL VS. AJLOUN ENTERPRISES LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Written Discovery Responses And Documents
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 25, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT AJLOUN ENTERPRISES LLC, MUATH ZGHOUL Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Written Discovery Responses And Documents is re-noticed for October 10, 2019. The motion will be heard in department 301 at 9:00 a.m. Courtesy copies of all papers in support of and in opposition to the motion shall be delivered to department 301 at least 5 court days before the hearing. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY CHIAPELONE VS. STEVEN CHIAPELONE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause To Defendant Steven Chiapelone
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 25, 2019 line 8. Order To Show Cause To Defendant Steven Chiapelone GRANTED, subject to the moving party providing a valid proof of service regarding notice of this hearing. Proof of Service currently on file is executed on September 4, 2019 attesting to service on September 5, 2019. This is not a valid proof of service. A valid proof of service must be filed by 9:20 a.m. on September 25, 2019. If no such proof of service is on file, the matter will be ordered off calendar. If a valid proof of service is timely filed, the relief is granted in accordance with alternative two outlined in the Order to Show Cause with the following modifications: subsection (h) is moot as an order has been executed on July 25, 2019; and Defendant shall have 15 days from the Notice of Entry of this order to remove his property. If Defendant fails to do so, Referee may proceed with Alternative Two. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL KELLOUGH ET AL VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 25, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT RICHARD CHAPMAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend subject to Defendant filing a valid proof of service. Proof of Service currently on file executed by Aaron Darsky fails to comply with CCP 2015.5. No opposition filed. If no valid proof of service is on file by 9:20 a.m. on September 25, 2019, the motion will be ordered off calendar. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KWOK WAH CHU VS. TAMMY BUHLER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion: Request For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Breach Of Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 25, 2019 line 6. PLAINTIFF KWOK CHU Motion: Request For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Breach Of Stipulation is DENIED. This Court has no jurisdiction as the case was dismissed without a Court order retaining jurisdiction. See Sayta v. Chu (2017) 17 Cal.App.5th 960. The Court also notes that on September 18, 2019 Plaintiff requested an Order Shortening Time for this motion. No order has been presented to the Courtroom clerks for filing. Plaintiff is ordered to return the original Order Shortening Time to the Court by 9:30 a.m. on September 25, 2019. =(501/REQ)
